column1:
"
Live MMLU Evaluation Runner
===========================
Evaluates one or more LLMs on MMLU via their live APIs, with real latency,
token usage, cost, and accuracy measurement. Produces a real CSV that anchors
the paper's simulated distributions.

USAGE
-----
# 0. Dry run first (NO API calls, NO cost) — verifies the whole pipeline:
python run_live_mmlu.py --models gpt-4o claude-3-5-sonnet --n 100 --dry-run

# 1. Real run (requires API keys in environment):
export OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-...
export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-...
export GEMINI_API_KEY=...
export TOGETHER_API_KEY=...          # for Llama 3 70B
python run_live_mmlu.py --models gpt-4o claude-3-5-sonnet gemini-1-5-pro llama3-70b --n 100

# 2. Single model, fewer samples (cheapest sanity check):
python run_live_mmlu.py --models claude-3-5-sonnet --n 25

OUTPUT
------
results/live_mmlu_raw.csv        — one row per (model, question)
results/live_mmlu_summary.csv    — one row per model with accuracy + 95% CI
"
# Pricing per 1M tokens (USD) — Q1 2025; update before final submission
mode = "DRY-RUN (no API)" if dry_run else "LIVE API"
# retry loop for transient API errors
correct = int(pred == q.answer) if pred else 0
acc_so_far = np.mean([r["correct"] for r in rows])
models = sorted(set(r["model"] for r in all_rows))
model_rows = [r for r in all_rows if r["model"] == model_key]
in_tok  = sum(r["input_tokens"]  for r in model_rows)
out_tok = sum(r["output_tokens"] for r in model_rows)
parse_fails = sum(1 for r in model_rows if r["predicted"] == "PARSE_FAIL")
errors      = sum(1 for r in model_rows if r["error"])
# weighted cost per 1M tokens at this run's actual input:output ratio

help="Path to MMLU CSVs (if not using HuggingFace)")
help="Seconds to sleep between calls (rate-limit safety; "
print(f"  Mode   : {'DRY-RUN (no cost)' if args.dry_run else 'LIVE API'}")
